home.title: TDEE & Macro Calculator — BMR, Activity, Goal Macros
home.description: Calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate and Total Daily Energy Expenditure using Mifflin-St Jeor or Katch-McArdle formulas, with goal-based macro recommendations.

guide.title: TDEE Guide — Mifflin, Katch-McArdle, Activity & Macros
guide.description: How BMR is calculated (Mifflin-St Jeor vs Katch-McArdle), activity multipliers, target calories by goal, and macro ratios for protein, fat, and carbs.

faq.title: TDEE FAQ — Formulas, Accuracy, Protein, Pregnancy & Metabolic Conditions
faq.description: Which formula is better, TDEE accuracy, high protein rationale, pregnancy use, metabolic conditions — 10 common questions answered.
